content.description:
Many code items use `document.createElement` directly instead of `api.createElement`. Switching to the API version would tag elements with `data-view-id` and `data-for-item` attributes (when debug mode is active), making them visible to the [Element Inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001).

## High-Priority Items (10+ calls each)

| Item | Calls | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| [app-page-design-lib](item://9e0953dc-b75c-4015-9c6f-79afad34d5a1) | 27 | Toolbar, widget cells, drag handles, overlays |
| [repl-ui](item://f1111111-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) | 23 | Panel, splitters, input/output areas, transcript entries |
| [test-suite-view](item://7e570003-0000-4000-8000-000000000000) | 18 | Test runner UI, result rows, indicators |
| [error-view](item://e7707000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003) | 15 | Error display, context boxes, stack frames |
| [json-editor](item://f1111111-0007-0000-0000-000000000000) | 11 | Modal editor overlay, textarea, buttons |
| [generic-editor](item://ffd688d1-93a8-4c4b-b09a-127b249294f5) | 11 | Field containers, labels, form controls |
| [hobson-instance-view](item://99999999-1111-0000-0000-000000000000) | 10 | Nested instance container, iframe, header controls |

## Medium-Priority Items (2–9 calls each)

| Item | Calls | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| [app-page-view](item://ef977316-0496-487a-b662-0ba07e40eea2) | 6 | Confirmation dialog UI |
| [help-dialog](item://f1111111-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) | 4 | Dialog, table, kbd elements |
| [field-editor-itemref](item://bccf2a2b-c750-417e-9d86-b96699cc5078) | 4 | Display area, select/clear buttons |
| [field-editor-select](item://c28eeb82-aac7-4bea-9d7b-7d17c1fd73e7) | 2 | `<select>` and `<option>` elements |
| [test-runner-service](item://7e570009-0000-4000-8000-000000000000) | 2 | Test area div, viewport div |

## Low-Priority Items (1 call each)

| Item | Calls | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| [element-inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001) | 1 | Highlight overlay |
| [field-editor-text](item://958dd20b-c30d-4eaa-b1f7-d73d2414c390) | 1 | `<input>` element |
| [field-editor-textarea](item://8271c69e-ec45-485b-9233-89efd8b562ab) | 1 | `<textarea>` element |
| [default-error-handler](item://e7707000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002) | 1 | Toast notification div |

**Total: 137 calls across 16 items.**

## Already Handled

- [modal-lib](item://2264e4e7-4ff7-4013-9f09-5393ff0e3116) — already supports `api?.createElement` with fallback. Callers should pass `{ api }` in options.
- [context-menu-lib](item://2cc0a1c5-5c09-49bd-834a-eaa2d0183b6c) — 51 calls already use `api.createElement`; only remaining call is a non-visible download `<a>`.

## Skip (Non-UI or No API Access)

These use `document.createElement` for `<style>` tags, download `<a>` elements, or third-party code — not meaningful for inspector tracking:

- [field-view-code-editable](item://e7b73a8e-2191-4ce5-ae9c-f721b5e30731), [field-view-markdown-editable](item://56f77a00-baf5-43cc-9dc4-8ad0c66f1e8f), [field-view-code-readonly](item://8e2f3e95-cc2d-44a3-beeb-0569f400da7c) — `<style>` tags only
- [css-loader-lib](item://c3cebc22-4a33-4182-b9a7-166316ba004e), [theme-hot-reload](item://e64adaeb-f701-400a-a3b7-a3cd36eb7b16) — `<style>` tags only
- [kernel-export](item://aaaa0001-1000-0000-0000-000000000000), [extract-js](item://9eaa5962-a61a-4320-943d-649fd7c4b98b) — download `<a>` only
- [codemirror](item://ad3bddac-95ce-41ae-aa11-6f6e6f537bc6) — third-party library
- `bootloader.html` — pre-kernel bootstrap, no `api` exists yet

## Kernel Core Consideration

[kernel:core](item://33333333-1111-0000-0000-000000000000) itself has 24 `document.createElement` calls in fallback UIs (item list, help dialog, raw editor, file import). These can't use `api.createElement` because the kernel is what creates `api` — a chicken-and-egg problem. Similarly, [kernel:rendering](item://33333333-5555-0000-0000-000000000000) has 5 calls for error containers.

A possible approach: extract a private `_createElement(tag, itemId)` helper on the kernel that always adds the debug attributes, and use it for kernel-generated UI. Then `api.createElement` would delegate to this same helper.

## Migration Approach

Each conversion is mechanical: replace `document.createElement('tag')` with `api.createElement('tag')`. Since `api.createElement` also handles props and children, some surrounding code (setting className, style, event handlers, appendChild) could be simplified at the same time, but that's optional.

Suggested order:
1. Start with field-editors (simple, 1–4 calls each) to validate the pattern
2. Then high-priority views (error-view, test-suite-view, hobson-instance-view)
3. Then the large items (app-page-design-lib, repl-ui) which may benefit from the props/children syntax too
4. Kernel internal helper last, as it requires an architectural change
